login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to access the Equipment Management System
login.heading: System Login
login.description: Authentication is required to access the Equipment Management System
login.authFailed: The email or password does not match. Please check your input.
login.systemError: A system error occurred. Please try again later.

branding.headline: Efficient Equipment Management
branding.subtitle: Manage lab equipment registration, calibration, rental, and checkout in one place.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to access this
errors.unknown: An error occurred while signing in. Please try again later

Configuration.title: Server Configuration Error
Configuration.description: There is a problem with the authentication server configuration. Please contact the administrator.

AccessDenied.title: Access Denied
AccessDenied.description: You do not have permission to access this resource.

Verification.title: Verification Failed
Verification.description: The verification link has expired or has already been used.

OAuthSignin.title: OAuth Sign-in Error
OAuthSignin.description: Failed to start the OAuth sign-in process.

OAuthCallback.title: OAuth Callback Error
OAuthCallback.description: Failed to process the response from the OAuth provider.

OAuthCreateAccount.title: Account Creation Error
OAuthCreateAccount.description: Failed to create an OAuth account.

EmailCreateAccount.title: Email Account Error
EmailCreateAccount.description: Failed to create an email account.

Callback.title: Callback Error
Callback.description: Failed to process the authentication callback.

OAuthAccountNotLinked.title: Account Linking Error
OAuthAccountNotLinked.description: This email address is already registered with a different sign-in method.

EmailSignin.title: Email Sign-in Error
EmailSignin.description: Failed to send the email sign-in link.

CredentialsSignin.title: Sign-in Failed
CredentialsSignin.description: The email or password is incorrect.

SessionRequired.title: Session Required
SessionRequired.description: You must be signed in to access this page.

Default.title: Authentication Error
Default.description: An error occurred during authentication. Please try again.

session.expiredDescription: You have been automatically signed out for security

idleTimeout.title: Inactivity Detected
idleTimeout.description: You will be automatically signed out due to inactivity.

devLogin.heading: Developer Mode - Quick Login
devLogin.hint: Select team and role for instant login (development only)

errorBoundary.title: An Error Occurred
errorBoundary.description: A problem occurred while loading the page.
errorBoundary.contactAdmin: If the problem continues, please contact the system administrator.
